name: Domina
bio: A relentless frontline tactician who dominates close spaces and forces enemies to respect her zone control.
appearance: Heavy plated armor, angular silhouette, and a glowing chest core that pulses before every engage.

name: D.Va
bio: A former pro gamer who pilots a mech with precision, protecting allies while diving high-value targets.
appearance: Pink combat mech with neon decals, compact pilot suit, and fast-jet style thruster effects.

name: Doomfist
bio: A power-driven commander who starts fights on his terms and collapses formations with momentum.
appearance: Massive cybernetic gauntlet, scarred physique, and formal tactical gear built for intimidation.

name: Hazard
bio: A pressure tank who turns narrow lanes into traps and punishes overextension with brutal timing.
appearance: Dark combat plating, jagged weapon motifs, and hazard-striped accents around the shoulders.

name: Junker Queen
bio: A brawler-queen who rallies her squad through aggression and thrives in chaotic close-range duels.
appearance: Punk warlord style, mohawk, spiked armor pieces, and a commanding arena-fighter presence.

name: Mauga
bio: A heavy assault specialist who overwhelms enemies with sustained fire and fearless advances.
appearance: Towering frame, twin chainguns, reinforced chest rig, and burning muzzle-flash glow.

name: Orisa
bio: A steadfast guardian built to anchor defenses and protect her team under relentless pressure.
appearance: Quadruped omnic frame with bronze-green plating, horned headpiece, and luminous energy seams.

name: Ramattra
bio: A strategic omnic revolutionary who alternates between calculated defense and overwhelming force.
appearance: Monastic omnic body, floating staff, and transforming battle frame with dark violet highlights.

name: Reinhardt
bio: A veteran knight who leads from the front and inspires allies with honor and bravery.
appearance: Huge crusader armor, lion-themed helmet, and a massive rocket-powered hammer.

name: Roadhog
bio: A ruthless enforcer who controls space with hooks and survives extended skirmishes through sheer grit.
appearance: Bulky scrap armor, gas mask, exposed belly plate, and industrial chain hook rig.

name: Sigma
bio: A brilliant astrophysicist whose fractured mind bends gravity into devastating battlefield control.
appearance: Floating barefoot stance, restraint harness, and orbiting gravity shards around his hands.

name: Winston
bio: A scientist-warrior gorilla who initiates with mobility and shields teammates in contested zones.
appearance: Advanced white exo-suit, orange visor, and a powerful Tesla weapon mounted at the forearm.

name: Wrecking Ball
bio: A genius hamster pilot who disrupts enemy lines with speed, knockback, and unpredictable movement.
appearance: Spherical mech chassis with grappling hardware and a small pilot cockpit at the core.

name: Zarya
bio: A disciplined soldier who converts pressure into power and protects allies with timed barriers.
appearance: Muscular build, short bright hair, and a heavy particle cannon with glowing coils.

name: Anran
bio: A covert duelist known for precision bursts and opportunistic flanks that break defensive setups.
appearance: Light tactical armor, stealth textures, and a slim rifle with bright targeting optics.

name: Emre
bio: A disciplined marksman who specializes in clean engagements and coordinated target focus.
appearance: Military jacket silhouette, utility belt, and compact firearm with reinforced recoil system.

name: Vendetta
bio: A vengeance-driven assassin who appears from angles enemies fail to track.
appearance: Dark cloak layers, sharp armor panels, and crimson visor lights.

name: Ashe
bio: A calculating outlaw leader who controls long sightlines and punishes exposed targets.
appearance: Western hat, elegant coat, and lever-action rifle with polished metallic trims.

name: Bastion
bio: A reformed battle unit whose calm nature hides a devastating artillery core.
appearance: Blocky omnic chassis, moss-worn armor panels, and a transforming cannon assembly.

name: Cassidy
bio: A gunslinger who thrives on timing, dueling confidence, and sharp mechanical aim.
appearance: Cowboy poncho, cybernetic arm, and heavy revolver with engraved detailing.

name: Echo
bio: An adaptive AI combat unit that mirrors threats and applies elegant aerial pressure.
appearance: Sleek white-blue omnic body, floating posture, and soft luminous accents.

name: Freja
bio: A mobility-heavy skirmisher who chains quick picks into high-tempo team advantages.
appearance: Streamlined armor, athletic frame, and high-tech gear with Nordic-inspired details.

name: Genji
bio: A cyber-ninja who blends discipline and speed to dismantle key targets in moments.
appearance: Green-lit cybernetic armor, katana mounted on the back, and agile ninja silhouette.

name: Hanzo
bio: A bow master who controls space through precision arrows and disciplined positioning.
appearance: Archer attire, exposed dragon tattoo, and ornate recurve bow with spirit motifs.

name: Junkrat
bio: An explosive chaos expert who turns open ground into a dangerous minefield.
appearance: Scrap-made prosthetic leg, wild hair, and grenade launcher strapped with improvised gear.

name: Mei
bio: A climate scientist who slows the tempo of fights and isolates enemies with control tools.
appearance: Blue expedition parka, round cryo-capsule gear, and compact endothermic blaster.

name: Pharah
bio: A disciplined sky soldier who dominates vertical angles with sustained rocket pressure.
appearance: Blue armored flight suit, wing-like thrusters, and shoulder-mounted rocket systems.

name: Reaper
bio: A shadow operative who excels at close-range ambushes and relentless flank pressure.
appearance: Black hooded trench armor, skull mask, and twin shotguns with spectral smoke trails.

name: Sojourn
bio: A tactical commander who blends mobility and rail precision to secure critical picks.
appearance: Cybernetic legs, clean military profile, and rifle with glowing rail capacitor.

name: Soldier: 76
bio: A veteran vigilante whose battlefield discipline turns pressure into steady frontline output.
appearance: Red visor, tactical jacket, and pulse rifle with integrated rocket launcher.

name: Sombra
bio: An elite infiltrator who manipulates visibility, information, and timing to collapse enemy plans.
appearance: Undercut hairstyle, neon cyber-lines, and lightweight stealth coat in violet tones.

name: Symmetra
bio: A hard-light architect who reshapes engagements through structure, angles, and precision beams.
appearance: Elegant blue-white attire, visor ornament, and crystalline hard-light projector.

name: Torbjorn
bio: A master engineer who locks down space with turrets and armored area denial.
appearance: Stocky build, mechanical arm, long beard, and forge-themed industrial armor.

name: Tracer
bio: A high-speed skirmisher who controls tempo with blink mobility and burst timing.
appearance: Orange chronal accelerator, bomber jacket, and short hair with pilot goggles.

name: Venture
bio: A fearless excavator-adventurer who disrupts lines through aggressive ground control.
appearance: Explorer outfit, protective goggles, and heavy drill-like excavation weapon.

name: Widowmaker
bio: A calm, lethal sniper who thrives in patient setups and high-impact eliminations.
appearance: Blue-toned skin, visor helm, sleek bodysuit, and long-range biotic rifle.

name: Jetpack Cat
bio: A hyper-mobile support specialist that follows pressure points and keeps teammates in motion.
appearance: Small feline frame in a compact jet harness with playful but tactical HUD lights.

name: Mizuki
bio: A graceful healer with balanced utility who enables coordinated pushes and safe resets.
appearance: Flowing support robes, luminous talismans, and soft cyan visual effects.

name: Ana
bio: A veteran field sniper who controls engagements with healing precision and anti-heal utility.
appearance: Tactical cloak, eyepatch, and long biotic rifle with medic attachments.

name: Baptiste
bio: A combat medic who blends burst healing and vertical repositioning for resilient backlines.
appearance: Armored combat medic suit, glowing backpack module, and biotic launcher gauntlets.

name: Brigitte
bio: A frontline protector who keeps teammates alive through armor, stuns, and close-range support.
appearance: Knight-inspired armor, compact shield unit, and rocket flail with orange accents.

name: Illari
bio: A solar-powered support who alternates between precise damage and high-value healing bursts.
appearance: Sun-themed armor lines, radiant crest, and rifle that glows with warm energy.

name: Juno
bio: A tempo support designed around mobility and proactive utility in fast-paced team fights.
appearance: Sleek support gear, orbital motifs, and bright teal energy modules.

name: Kiriko
bio: A swift protector who jumps between allies and saves fights with precise utility timing.
appearance: Streetwear-shrine blend, fox motifs, and kunai with glowing spirit trails.

name: Lifeweaver
bio: A biolight specialist who repositions teammates and sustains fights with elegant utility.
appearance: Floral biolight petals, polished suit design, and luminous pink-green effects.

name: Lucio
bio: A momentum support who amplifies team speed and sustain with rhythm-based control.
appearance: Green audio gear, roller blades, and sonic amplifier with waveform visuals.

name: Mercy
bio: A battlefield guardian who empowers allies and stabilizes engagements under pressure.
appearance: White-gold Valkyrie suit, halo-like headpiece, and articulated mechanical wings.

name: Moira
bio: A controversial biotic scientist who trades ethics for efficiency and battlefield impact.
appearance: Black-purple coat, asymmetrical glove systems, and volatile biotic energy streams.

name: Wuyang
bio: A precise utility support focused on controlled healing windows and team fight setup.
appearance: Ceremonial-tech hybrid robes with metallic trims and focused aura effects.

name: Zenyatta
bio: A transcendental monk who balances calm harmony with lethal orb precision.
appearance: Floating omnic monk form, bead-like orbs circling the body, and serene posture.
